sections.heading: Service summary
sections.prose: `contact360.extension` contains the **Chrome extension** only (MV3 shell, capture, `lambdaClient`, auth/utils). The **Sales Navigator ingestion API** (`/v1/save-profiles`, `/v1/scrape`, `/health`) is implemented in **`EC2/extension.server`** (Go). Together they provide the LinkedIn/Sales Navigator capture channel for Contact360 contact/company ingestion.

sections.heading: Runtime architecture snapshot
sections.prose:
- Extension shell:
  - `manifest.json` (MV3), `background.js`, `content.js`, `popup.html/css/js`
  - auth/session helper: `auth/graphqlSession.js`
  - transport + batching: `utils/lambdaClient.js`
  - dedup/merge: `utils/profileMerger.js`
- Backend service (**`EC2/extension.server`**):
  - Gin router + API key middleware: `internal/api/router.go`
  - flexible profile ingest: `internal/saveflex/`
  - Sales Navigator HTML extract: `internal/scrapesn/`
  - Connectra client + upsert-bulk: `internal/connectra/`, mapping under `internal/mapper/`
  - deploy: Docker / `docker-compose.yml`, `.env.example`

items.text: Extension shell:
`manifest.json` (MV3), `background.js`, `content.js`, `popup.html/css/js`
auth/session helper: `auth/graphqlSession.js`
transport + batching: `utils/lambdaClient.js`
dedup/merge: `utils/profileMerger.js`
Backend service (**`EC2/extension.server`**):
Gin router + API key middleware: `internal/api/router.go`
flexible profile ingest: `internal/saveflex/`
Sales Navigator HTML extract: `internal/scrapesn/`
Connectra client + upsert-bulk: `internal/connectra/`, mapping under `internal/mapper/`
deploy: Docker / `docker-compose.yml`, `.env.example`

items.text: ✅ Extension shell artifacts exist (manifest, background service worker, content script, popup UI).
✅ MV3 storage/session path exists for access and refresh token handling.
✅ Batched profile submission client exists (`lambdaClient`) with queue/retry/adaptive timeout behavior.
✅ Backend API (Go extension.server) with API-key middleware and save profiles is implemented.
✅ Profile dedup/merge logic exists and test coverage files are present.

sections.heading: Security and endpoint scope
sections.prose:
- [ ] 🟡 In Progress: host permissions were reduced to explicit LinkedIn and Contact360 API origins; further route-level minimization is pending.
- [x] ✅ Completed: backend CORS wildcard removed; service uses environment-scoped `CORS_ORIGINS` allowlist. Settings validation requires a non-empty allowlist when `APP_ENV` is `production` / `prod` (default `APP_ENV` is `development` for local runs).
- [ ] 🟡 In Progress: API key auth exists but key lifecycle/rotation constraints are not fully governed in docs/runtime checks.

items.text: 🟡 In Progress: host permissions were reduced to explicit LinkedIn and Contact360 API origins; further route-level minimization is pending.

✅ Completed: backend CORS wildcard removed; service uses environment-scoped `CORS_ORIGINS` allowlist. Settings validation requires a non-empty allowlist when `APP_ENV` is `production` / `prod` (default `APP_ENV` is `development` for local runs).
🟡 In Progress: API key auth exists but key lifecycle/rotation constraints are not fully governed in docs/runtime checks.

sections.heading: Contract and product drift
sections.prose:
- [ ] ⬜ Incomplete: extension save endpoint contract and backend payload contract still need strict parity tests.
- [ ] 🟡 In Progress: extension runtime references config/constants patterns that need single canonical source.
- [x] ✅ Completed: `auth/graphqlSession.js` now uses non-module global runtime contract (no ES module export mismatch in MV3 load order).
- [x] ✅ Completed: popup-configured gateway API key fallback is now wired to `/v1/save-profiles` requests (`X-API-Key`).
- [ ] ⬜ Incomplete: trace correlation contract (extension event -> backend ingest -> Connectra write) is not fully formalized.

items.text: ⬜ Incomplete: extension save endpoint contract and backend payload contract still need strict parity tests.
🟡 In Progress: extension runtime references config/constants patterns that need single canonical source.
✅ Completed: `auth/graphqlSession.js` now uses non-module global runtime contract (no ES module export mismatch in MV3 load order).
✅ Completed: popup-configured gateway API key fallback is now wired to `/v1/save-profiles` requests (`X-API-Key`).
⬜ Incomplete: trace correlation contract (extension event -> backend ingest -> Connectra write) is not fully formalized.

sections.heading: Reliability and observability
sections.prose:
- [ ] 🟡 In Progress: `lambdaClient` has retry/backoff/queueing, but reliability SLOs and failure budgets are not defined.
- [ ] ⬜ Incomplete: telemetry/log event taxonomy for extension operations is not normalized with `logs.api` conventions.
- [ ] 🟡 In Progress: content script now supports runtime scrape bridge and background orchestration; extraction quality and guardrails still need hardening.

items.text: 🟡 In Progress: `lambdaClient` has retry/backoff/queueing, but reliability SLOs and failure budgets are not defined.
⬜ Incomplete: telemetry/log event taxonomy for extension operations is not normalized with `logs.api` conventions.
🟡 In Progress: content script now supports runtime scrape bridge and background orchestration; extraction quality and guardrails still need hardening.
